zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Bethune於1486年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏可希時，她的父親Sir David Bethune26歲，母親Janet Duddingston19歲。她於1502年與Robert Livingston結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在英國蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire波奧斯享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire波奧斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Bethune于1486年出生在英国苏格兰費伏可希时，她的父亲Sir David Bethune26岁，母亲Janet Duddingston19岁。她于1502年与Robert Livingston结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在英国苏格兰Linlithgowshire波奧斯享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰Linlithgowshire波奧斯。

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Bethune was born in 1486, in Creich, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir David Bethune, was 26 and her mother, Janet Duddingston, was 19. She married Robert Livingston in 1502. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1522, in Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Bethune est née en 1486, à Creich, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir David Bethune, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Janet Duddingston, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Livingston en 1502. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Bethune 1486 in Creich, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir David Bethune 26 und ihre Mutter Janet Duddingston 19. Sie hat 1502 Robert Livingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Robert Livingston nel 1502. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1522, nel Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Bethuneが1486年にイギリススコットランドフィフクレイチで生まれた時，父Sir David Bethuneは26歳，母Janet Duddingstonは19歳であった。1502年にRobert Livingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年にイギリススコットランドLinlithgowshireボ'ネスで36歳で死去し，スコットランドLinlithgowshireボ'ネスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Bethune(이)가 1486년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 크레이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir David Bethune(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Duddingston(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1502년 Robert Livingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 스코틀랜드 Linlithgowshire 보'네스에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 보'네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Bethune nasceu em 1486, em Creich, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir David Bethune, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Janet Duddingston, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Livingston em 1502. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1522, em Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Bethune родилась в 1486 г. в местности краич, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir David Bethune было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Duddingston, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Livingston в 1502 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности бо'несс, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности бо'несс, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия.

Se casó con Robert Livingston en 1502. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1522, en Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Bo'ness, Linlithgowshire, Scotland.
